description: Global tuning state — tracks per-shape kernel status across all scenarios and dtypes. All work on main branch. v3: 134 unique shapes x 2 dtypes = 268 entries.

f16_4096x8192x8192.note: Reference shape — no tuning needed, counts as 30

f16_512x8192x8192.note: COMPLETED 30 iters. 1 block/SM bottleneck. Needs from-scratch.

f16_4096x4096x4096.note: COMPLETED 30 iters. WN128 + META=8 + double nanosleep. +1.5%

f16_8192x8192x8192.note: COMPLETED 30 iters. META=8 (+0.2%). DRAM bandwidth limited.

f16_2048x8192x8192.note: COMPLETED 30 iters. Baseline already optimal. All ideas DISCARD.

f16_4096x16384x16384.note: COMPLETED 30 iters. DRAM limited. Baseline at ceiling.

f16_4096x6144x8192.note: COMPLETED 30 iters. maxreg128 (+4.9%). SMEM throughput bottleneck, 1 block/SM occupancy limit.

f16_4096x8192x4096.note: COMPLETED 30 iters. K=4096 too small, all within noise. Needs from-scratch.

f16_4096x8192x6144.note: COMPLETED 30 iters. META8+maxreg160 (+13.1%). K=6144 benefits from different register/meta balance.

f16_4096x8192x12288.note: COMPLETED 30 iters. DRAM limited, all within noise. Needs from-scratch.

e4m3_3072x8192x8192.note: COMPLETED 30 iters. WN128+O3+ftz (+0.3%). Latency-bound, baseline well-optimized.

e4m3_4096x8192x8192.note: Reference shape — no tuning needed, counts as 30

f16_768x768x768_fs.note: COMPLETED 150 iters. Best 48.5670 TFLOPS at iter129.
